## 📋 Pull Request Checklist

Please ensure your PR meets these requirements:

- [ ] **Code follows project style** (run `./scripts/dev.sh fmt` and `./scripts/dev.sh clippy`)
- [ ] **All tests pass** (run `./scripts/dev.sh test`)
- [ ] **Pre-commit hooks pass** (run `./scripts/dev.sh precommit`)
- [ ] **Documentation updated** (if applicable)
- [ ] **Commit messages follow conventional format**
- [ ] **PR has appropriate labels and milestone**

## 📝 Description

<!-- Brief description of changes -->

### 🎯 Purpose
<!-- What problem does this PR solve? -->

### 🔧 Changes Made
<!-- List of specific changes -->

### 🧪 Testing
<!-- How did you test these changes? -->

## 📊 Type of Change

Please check the relevant boxes:

- [ ] 🐛 **Bug fix** (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ **New feature** (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 **Breaking change** (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 **Documentation update** (documentation only changes)
- [ ] 🎨 **Code style** (formatting, missing semicolons, etc.; no code changes)
- [ ] ♻️ **Refactor** (non-breaking change that improves code quality)
- [ ] ⚡ **Performance** (code changes that improve performance)
- [ ] 🧪 **Tests** (adding or updating tests)

## 🔗 Related Issues

<!-- Link to any related issues -->
- Closes #(issue number)
- Fixes #(issue number)
- Related to #(issue number)

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

<!-- Add screenshots to help explain your changes -->

## 🧪 Additional Context

<!-- Any additional context, design decisions, or considerations -->

## 📋 Review Checklist

### For Reviewers

- [ ] Code is well-structured and follows Rust best practices
- [ ] Tests are comprehensive and cover edge cases
- [ ] Documentation is clear and accurate
- [ ] Performance implications are considered
- [ ] Security implications are considered
- [ ] Breaking changes are clearly documented (if any)

### For Author

- [ ] Ready for review
- [ ] All requested changes have been addressed
- [ ] Tests have been updated if needed

---

## 🚀 Merge Requirements

Before this PR can be merged:

1. ✅ All CI checks must pass
2. ✅ At least one approval from a maintainer
3. ✅ No merge conflicts
4. ✅ Documentation updated (if applicable)

## 📞 Questions or Concerns?

<!-- Let us know if you have any questions or concerns about this PR -->

---

**Thank you for contributing to Ferriprove!** 🎉
